title: nuphar fluviatilis
intro: Nuphar fluviatilis, also known as the spatterdock or yellow water lily, is a plant species that belongs to the Nymphaeaceae family and is commonly found in freshwater habitats. Traditionally, Nuphar fluviatilis has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiviral properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and acting as a diuretic. Nuphar fluviatilis is often prepared for medicinal use through herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
